proxy_query: select * from (SELECT ConfigType, Address, Port, Id, Security, Network, StreamSecurity, Remarks, RequestHost, Path, AllowInsecure, Sni, Alpn, Fingerprint, PublicKey, ShortId, SpiderX, MuxEnabled, IndexId, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY IndexId) AS linenum FROM ProfileItem WHERE ConfigType IN (3, 5, 6) ORDER BY IndexId ) a where a.linenum BETWEEN 401 AND 500;
proxy_query1: select * from (SELECT ConfigType, Address, Port, Id, Security, Network, StreamSecurity, Remarks, RequestHost, Path, AllowInsecure, Sni, Alpn, Fingerprint, PublicKey, ShortId, SpiderX, MuxEnabled, IndexId, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY IndexId) AS linenum FROM ProfileItem WHERE address= '185.234.57.216' and ConfigType IN (3, 5, 6) ORDER BY IndexId ) a where a.linenum BETWEEN 0 AND 1;
clear_statements: DELETE FROM profileitem WHERE StreamSecurity = '' AND Subid <> '5544178410297751350';
DELETE FROM ProfileItem WHERE rowid NOT IN (SELECT MIN(rowid) FROM ProfileItem GROUP BY address, port, Network);
DELETE FROM ProfileExItem WHERE IndexId NOT IN (SELECT IndexId FROM ProfileItem);
